text: Part one, entering the store and getting
a cart.
Excuse me, where are the shopping carts?
They are right outside the main
entrance.
Do you have any baskets left?
Yes, there's a stack right over there.
Excuse me. Is this cart taken? No, it's
not. Go ahead.
Excuse me. Are you using this cart? Yes,
I am. Sorry about that.
Can I help you find anything? I'm just
browsing. Thank you. We have a lot to
buy today. Let's get a cart. Good idea.
I'll go grab one.
Where is the store directory? It's right
next to the customer service desk.
Can we bring our bags inside?
Actually, you'll have to put them in a
locker first. They're just over there.
Okay. Thank you.
Part two, locating items and asking for
directions.
Sure. The dairy section is in aisle six.
Great. Thank you. What aisle is the
bread in?
You'll find it in aisle six.
Where would I find the paper towels?
They are with the cleaning supplies in
aisle 9.
Are the spices down this aisle?
No, they are in the next aisle over.
Excuse me, where can I find the dairy
aisle? It's aisle 4 at the back of the
store.
Do you sell organic produce?
Yes, the organic section is just behind
you.
I can't seem to find the cereal.
It's right behind you on the top shelf.
Do you carry gluten-free products?
Yes, we have a dedicated section in
aisle 7.
I'm looking for canned tomatoes.
They are on the middle shelf in aisle 3.
Part three, checking stock and
availability.
Are you out of whole milk?
Let me check the back room for you.
Is this item currently out of stock?
Yes, it's been very popular today.
I think you're sold out of eggs.
I'll bring out a new pallet right now.
When will you be restocking the fresh
strawberries? We get a new delivery
tomorrow morning.
Do you have any more of these in the
back?
I'm sorry. What's on the shelf is all we
have left.
Do you have this in a larger size?
Yes, the family size is on the bottom
shelf. Part four, asking about prices
and promotions.
How much does this cost?
What's the price per pound for the
apples?
They are $1.99 per pound.
The sign says it's buy one get one free.
That's correct. You can grab another
one.
Does this coupon apply to this item?
Yes, it does.
Is there a discount on this?
Only if you use your store loyalty card.
How long is this promotion valid for? It
runs until the end of the month.
This seems a bit overpriced.
It's an imported product, so the price
is higher.
I think this was marked down.
Let me verify the price tag for you.
Part five. Ordering at the meat and
seafood counter.
I'll take a pound of ground beef.
Would you like the lean or extra lean?
Extra lean, please. Could I try a sample
of that ham? Certainly. Here you go.
Thank you.
Can I get two chicken breasts?
Sure. Skin on or skinless?
Skinless, please.
Is that enough meat for you?
That's enough. Thank you.
How fresh is the salmon today?
It just came in this morning. Very
fresh.
Can you wrap that up for me?
Yes, I'll put it in freezer safe paper.
I'd like a quarter pound of cheddar
cheese.
Mild or sharp cheddar?
I'll go with sharp. I need half a pound
of pushcuto sliced paper thin, please.
You got it. Is this thickness okay for
you?
That's perfect. Are those chicken
skewers pre-marinated?
Yes, they are in a teriyak glaze. We
make them fresh every morning.
Awesome. Let me get half a dozen of
those.
I'd like a pound of the jumbo shrimp.
Are they already deained?
Yes, they sure are. Did you want to keep
the tails on or off?
Keep the tails on, please.
Part six, picking out fresh produce.
We have a great selection of local
produce today.
Are these avocados ready to eat?
Yes, they are soft and perfect for
today.
These tomatoes are very fresh.
They are locally grown and delivered
daily. These bananas look a bit too
ripe.
We have greener ones on the display over
there.
Are these grapes sweet?
Yes, you can try one if you like.
How much are the loose carrots?
They are 99 cents a pound.
I need a bunch of fresh parsley.
It's right next to the cilantro.
Can I weigh these apples here?
Yes, the scale is right behind you.
I'll grab a bag of potatoes. Make sure
to check for any soft spots.
Let's get some leafy greens for the
salad. The spinach looks really good
today. Part seven, navigating the aisles
and courtesy.
Can you grab a box of tissues from the
top shelf? Sure, I can reach it.
I think we have enough snacks. You're
right. Let's stop buying chips.
We're running low on toilet paper. Good
catch. Let's grab a big pack.
Let's go down the next aisle. Okay, we
still need to find the pasta.
Have we forgotten anything on the list?
Let me double check. Oh, we need butter.
Sorry. Could I just grab one of those
milk cartons behind you?
Oh, let me step out of your way.
Thank you. Sorry to interrupt. Sorry to
bother you, but could you reach that
cereal on the top shelf for me?
Sure thing. This one right here.
Yes, that's it. Thanks a million.
Whoops. Sorry. I didn't see you coming
around the corner.
It's okay. No harm done. These carts are
tricky to steer.
Excuse me. Can I squeeze past you?
Oh, sorry. Let me move my cart.
Oh, I'm sorry. I thought this was my
cart for a second.
No problem. They all look exactly the
same.
I know, right? My mistake. Let's head to
the checkout now. Okay, I think we have
everything.
You only have two items. Would you like
to go ahead of us? Are you sure? That's
very kind of you. Absolutely. Go for it.
We're in no rush.
Oh, go ahead. You can go first.
Thank you. I only have one item.
Part eight. At the checkout lane. This
is where we pay for our groceries. The
cashier will help us.
Are you open?
Yes, I can help you right here.
I'm ready to check out. Great. Please
place your items on the belt.
Could I have paper bags instead of
plastic? Sure. Paper bags are 10 cents
each.
Could you double bag the heavy items,
please?
Of course. I don't want them to rip.
Do you have a rewards card with us? No,
I don't have one yet. Would you like to
sign up today? It's free. I'd love to.
Where do I need to go? Just right over
there at customer service. They'll help
you out. Can I get your phone number for
your rewards points? Sure. It's
Got it. Thank you. Part nine, making a
payment.
How would you like to pay? I'll pay by
credit card. Is it contactless? Yes,
just tap your card right here.
Do you take Apple Pay? Yes, you can just
tap your phone on the screen.
Do you take Momo Pay? Yes, we do. You
can scan the QR code right here on the
screen. Okay, done. Did it go through?
Yes, it's all set. Here is your receipt.
See you next time.
Can I pay with cash? Certainly. Your
total is $45. Do you have a rewards card
with us?
Oh, I left my card at home. No problem.
Just give me your phone number. 012
Found it. You actually have a $5 reward
voucher available. Would you like to use
it today?
Oh, definitely. That's awesome. Thanks
for checking.
My pleasure. Your new total is $40.
Thank you. And here is your change.
Thank you. Have a nice day.
You too. Part 10. Leaving the store and
returning the cart.
Have a great day.
Thanks. You too.
Safe travels.
Wow, the line was really long today.
Yes, weekends are always busy.
I think I left my umbrella at the
register. Let's go to the lost and found
desk to check.
Hi. Did anyone find a duck umbrella?
Is this the one? It just came in.
Yes, that's mine. Thanks a million.
Let's load up the trunk. Can you open it
for me?
Let me put the cart back in the return
area.
Thanks. That helps us a lot.
Can I leave the cart here? Please take
it to the designated cart corral.
Oh, okay. Where is that?
Right over there next to the sign.
Okay. Thank you.
Could someone help me carry these to my
car? Let me call an assistant for you.
Thanks for your help.
It's my pleasure. See you next time.
All done. Let's head home. I'm ready to
cook dinner.
Thank you so much for watching. If you
liked our video, don't forget to hit the
heart button and subscribe to our
channel. See you.
